member.name: T:LocoCalcAvalonia.Android.AndroidLocoDataProvider
member.summary: Reads loco JSONs from APK assets (Locos/ folder).

member.name: T:LocoCalcAvalonia.Android.AndroidPdfGenerator
member.summary: Generates PDF using the built-in Android.Graphics.Pdf API. No QuestPDF or SkiaSharp required.

member.name: T:LocoCalcAvalonia.Android.AndroidPdfSaveService
member.summary: Android PDF implementation using the built-in Android.Graphics.Pdf.PdfDocument API. No QuestPDF/SkiaSharp needed. Saves to CacheDir and shares via FileProvider intent.

member.name: M:LocoCalcAvalonia.Android.AndroidPdfSaveService.PickSavePathAsync(System.String)
member.summary: On Android we don't show a save dialog — we save to cache and share later. Returns the temp path so the caller can generate + write the bytes.

member.name: M:LocoCalcAvalonia.Android.AndroidPdfSaveService.OpenFile(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the PDF via FileProvider share intent.

member.name: T:LocoCalcAvalonia.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
